chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S- 173 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 1593/23 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on MA 1594/23 4.For hearing of main case 15-03-2023 Mr. Asif Javed Randhawa, Advocate for the applicant. ****** Through instant Crl. Misc. Application, the applicant has impugned the order dated 27.01.2023, whereby Crl. Misc. Application No.118 of 2023 filed by him under Sections 22-A&B Cr.P.C for registration of FIR against proposed accused persons for allegedly stealing solar plates from his Otaque was dismissed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kandiaro by observing in the light of report of DSP, Complaint cell, Naushehro Feroze that there is dispute between the parties over landed property and no such offence has taken place within the jurisdiction of P.S, Kandiaro. Learned counsel for the applicant has not been able to deny such fact/observation of learned ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Even he has not stated categorically in the instant Crl. Misc. Application that the applicant has no dispute with the proposed accused over the landed property. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application being devoid of any merit stands dismissed in limine along with listed applications leaving the applicant at liberty to file Crl. Direct Complaint under Section 200, Cr.P.C for redressal of his grievance, if so advised. JUDGE Ahmad
